summary: The guarded-run implementation UX is acceptable at current HEAD; all four prior findings are resolved and no new findings were identified.
inspection_summary: Reviewed the Story, Architecture, Spec, test plan, main...HEAD diff, implementation, CLI routing, current verification artifacts, and prior findings. Independently reran the focused guarded-run suite: 33 tests passed. Exact-head persisted evidence records 1123 full-suite tests passed. Legacy behavior, human/JSON surfaces, rejected-candidate visibility, target validation, recovery handles, and explicit repository repair context are covered.
inspection_evidence: git diff --check main...HEAD and cmp -s CLAUDE.md AGENTS.md exited 0
judgment_delta: ux-repair-handle-not-rendered -> resolved: human output includes identifiers, artifacts, and exact repair command.
path-surface-human-cli-coverage-missing -> resolved: production fresh-process tests cover guarded commands in human and JSON forms.
ux-silent-target-option -> resolved: incompatible targets produce typed invalid_target failures.
ux-repair-command-repo-context-lost -> resolved: explicit repository context is retained with POSIX shell-safe quoting.
